Each proposal should stem from a simple and elegant question, observation, or hypothesis about the topic. {"idea": {"Name": "spectral_precision_routing", "Title": "Spectral Precision Routing: Training-Free Dynamic Mixed-Precision Inference via Activation Geometry Diagnostics", "Short Hypothesis": "The spectral condition number, SVD decay of activation covariances, and approximate Hessian spectra directly predict numerical sensitivity to precision reduction.
